description: As a GIS technologist, prepare the Sentinel-2 RGB imagery (/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_b432.tif) for a topographic mapping project. Reproject the imagery into a projected coordinate system with metric units and create a spatial subset of a region of interest within the scene. Save the processed product in BEAM-DIMAP format and export the final map-ready GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/.
